attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 WIRRL.BK_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION_NUM,
WIRRL.DV_RMA_REQUEST_SUBMIT_DATE DV_RMA_REQUEST_SUBMIT_DT,
COALESCE(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-999) ORIGINAL_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
WIRRL.RMA_REQUEST_LINE_RETURN_QTY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' ACTION_CODE,
'I' DML_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.WI_RMA_REQUEST_LINE WIRRL
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL
ON (WIRRL.ORIGINAL_SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY AND WIRRL.LINE_NUMBER=NSOL.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT )
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY WIRRL.BK_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION_NUM,WIRRL.LINE_NUMBER ORDER BY WIRRL.DV_RMA_REQUEST_SUBMIT_DATE DESC)=1

SELECT
BATCH_ID                      	,
SHIP_TO_ADDRESS_LINE_3        	,
FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE          	,
M_ROW$$                       	,
REQUEST_NUMBER                	,
LINE_ID                       	,
LINE_NUMBER                   	,
ITEM                          	,
USER_SELECTABLE               	,
ORDERED_QUANTITY              	,
SELLING_PRICE                 	,
EXISTING_RMA_QUANTITY         	,
RETURNABLE_QUANTITY           	,
RETURN_QUANTITY               	,
EXP_AND                        	,
ITEM_TYPE                     	,
PARENT_LINE_ID                	,
DEPENDENT_CHILD               	,
SHIPMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE_ID     	,
CREATION_DATE                 	,
LINE_CREATION_DATE            	,
DISCOUNT_PERCENTAGE           	,
INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             	,
ITEM_TYPE_CODE                	,
LIST_PRICE                    	,
SHIP_SET_NUMBER               	,
LAST_UPDATED_BY               	,
UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CODE          	,
WAREHOUSE_ID                  	,
PAYMENT_TERMS                 	,
PAYMENT_TERMS_ID              	,
SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID           	,
SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER              	,
SHIP_TO_ADDRESS_ID            	,
SHIP_TO_ADDRESS_LINE_1        	,
SHIP_TO_ADDRESS_LINE_2        	,
SHIP_TO_ADDRESS_LINE_4        	,
SHIP_TO_ADDRESS_CITY          	,
SHIP_TO_ADDRESS_STATE         	,
SHIP_TO_ADDRESS_ZIP           	,
SHIP_TO_ADDRESS_COUNTY        	,
SHIP_TO_ADDRESS_COUNTRY       	,
SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID            	,
SHIP_TO_CONTACT_FIRST_NAME    	,
SHIP_TO_CONTACT_LAST_NAME     	,
SHIP_TO_CONTACT_EMAIL         	,
SHIP_TO_CONTACT_STATUS_CODE   	,
REVENUE_SOURCE                	,
COUNTRY                       	,
RETURN_REFERENCE_ID           	,
GES_UPDATE_DATE               	,
GLOBAL_NAME                   	,
CREATE_DATETIME               	,
ACTION_CD                     	
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CMRS_RMA_LINES SCRL
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL,
$$SERVICEVWDB.N_RMA_REQUEST NRR
WHERE SCRL.REQUEST_NUMBER=NRR.BK_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION_NUM AND 
SCRL.LINE_NUMBER=NSOL.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NRR.ORIGINAL_SALES_ORDER_KEY
)
